title: chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. hololeucus
intro: Chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. hololeucus, also known as rubber rabbitbrush, is a plant species that belongs to the aster family and is native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. hololeucus include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
